sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 46 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 12. 2. For orders on CMA No.833/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.04.2026 Mr. Immad Qamer, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Per learned counsel the question proposed has already been decided against the applicant inter alia in SSTRA 228 of 2025, therefore, he states that the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
